title: sourcing map 3pcs S Hooks 3.5" Plastic Hanging S Shaped Hooks Large S Hanger Closet Rod Hooks for Hanging Kitchen Utensils Cups Plants Jewelry Jeans Clothes Towels Tools, Black
features: Size - Two Side Opening: 40mm / 1.57"; Total Length: 90mm / 3.5"; Width: 40mm / 1.57"; Diameter: 13mm / 0.51"; Weight Capacity: 5kg / 11lbs; Package Includes: 3pcs S Hooks.

Material - These S-shaped hooks are made of preferred plastic, which is lighter than heavy metal hooks, easier to carry and install, and reduces the worry of rust, corrosion, and discoloration. The soft material is safer to use, has no scratches and noise, is not easy to break or deform, and is durable.

Feature - S-shaped plastic hook adopts a unique twist lock design, which is simple and elegant with beautiful appearance. The S-shaped lock can firmly grasp the wall rod and effectively prevent accidental falling off when taking items away; the hanging design can effectively utilize vertical space, save space, bring convenience and beautify the space for your home, office and kitchen.

Application - The versatile hook is suitable for most closet rods, wall hook brackets, pegboards and crates. You can use it in the kitchen, closet, garden, bathroom, garage, office, storage room, laundry room and outdoors to hang any of your tools, clothes, etc., including pots, shovels, cups, towels, bags, jewelry, clothes, jeans, hats, belts, plants, keys, tools, etc.

Usage - The S-shaped design of the hook makes it easy to install and remove, without the need for tools, nails, screws or adhesives, you can hang them directly on brackets, rods, racks, and poles for use without causing any damage, simple and fast, and it does not require fixed installation, you can move the position at any time as needed, flexible and convenient.
